title: India-Japan Discuss West Asia Conflict, Hormuz Strait in Phone Call Between EAM Jaishankar, FM Motegi
description: Indian External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar held a 20-minute telephonic discussion with Japanese Foreign Minister Toshimitsu Motegi to address the evolving situation in West Asia. The leaders welcomed the recent US-Iran ceasefire and emphasized the critical importance of maintaining the safety of international shipping routes, particularly the Strait of Hormuz. Minister Motegi offered condolences for Indian lives lost in recent conflicts, while both nations reaffirmed their commitment to multi
